message:
chore(beads): Close wa and brenner_bot SUB-EPICs

- bd-1ega.4: Add wezterm_automata (wa) to ACFS - CLOSED
- bd-1ega.5: Add brenner_bot to ACFS - CLOSED
- bd-1ega.4.8: Create React lesson component for wa - CLOSED
- bd-1ega.5.8: Create React lesson component for brenner_bot - CLOSED

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add wezterm_automata (wa) to ACFS with full flywheel integration.

## About wezterm_automata

- Binary: wa
- Purpose: Multi-agent orchestration and observability via WezTerm
- Repo: /dp/wezterm_automata

## Integration Points

1. acfs.manifest.yaml - Add stack.wezterm_automata entry
2. checksums.yaml - Add installer hash
3. doctor.sh - Add health check
4. update.sh - Add version tracking
5. flywheel.ts - Add tool definition with synergies
6. tldr-content.ts - Add summary
7.  {"id":"bd-1ega.6","title":"SUB-EPIC: Add all utility tools to ACFS","description":"## Overview

Add all 10 utility tools to ACFS with basic integration.

## Utility Tools

| Tool | Binary | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| toon_rust | tru | Token-optimized notation format |
| rust_proxy | rust_proxy | Transparent proxy routing |
| rano | rano | Network observer for AI CLIs |
| xf | xf | X (Twitter) archive search |
| markdown_web_browser | mdwb | Website to Markdown converter |
| process_triage | pt | Zombie process detector |
| aadc | aadc | ASCII diagram corrector |
| source_to_prompt_tui | s2p | Code to LLM prompt generator |
| coding_agent_usage_tracker | caut | LLM provider usage tracker |

## Integration Per Utility

1. acfs.manifest.yaml - Add entry with verified_installer
2. checksums.yaml - Add installer hash
3. doctor.sh - Optional health check
4. update.sh - Optional version tracking

## Note

User decided ALL utilities should be included by default (not optional)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-24T23:13:58.808871111Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T04:26:25.054273615Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T04:26:25.054251063Z","close_reason":"All 10 children (bd-1ega.6.1 through bd-1ega.6.10) closed.
